issues.title: Enemy dealt 35 dmg (100% of 35 HP) on floor 3 enc 1
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 1, turn 23 (seq 403), the enemy dealt 35 damage which is 100% of the player's 35 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 1 by crystal_golem (common)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 1 against crystal_golem (common). Accuracy was 51% over 23 turns. They dealt 64 damage and took 174 damage. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy stats for floors 1-3.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 1: 23 turns vs prev floor avg 9.7 (2.4x)
issues.description: Encounter 1 on floor 3 (enemy: crystal_golem, common) took 23 turns to resolve, which is 2.4x the previous floor's average of 9.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: HP dropped from 90 to 0 in floor 3 encounter 1
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 1, player HP dropped from 90 to 0. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage caps per encounter or provide emergency healing at low HP.
